name: R CellChat ligand-receptor bubble plot
description: Plot explicit CellChat ligand-receptor rows with sender-to-receiver pairs on x, interactions on y, communication probability as fill and model p-value as point area.

parameters.name: top_n
parameters.description: Explicit display-only top-N by communication probability after thresholding.

parameters.name: p_threshold
parameters.description: Declared model p-value display threshold; null disables this filter.

parameters.name: p_floor
parameters.description: Display cap for -log10(p), preventing infinite point sizes.

transformations.method: declared p threshold then top-N probability display filter

supports_claims: Displays model-inferred ligand-receptor patterns under the declared filters.
does_not_support: Model p-values are not independent biological replication; the plot does not prove physical binding, flux or causality.
safer_alternatives: exact table when quantitative ranking is primary

visual_fingerprint.final_size_behavior: requires axis-label, smallest-point and dual-legend review
visual_fingerprint.review_note: Real PBMC3K CellChat top-30 render was opened at 240 by 190 mm and both 150/300 dpi on 2026-07-18. Sender-receiver labels, five represented ligand-receptor rows, probability fill scale and model-p area legend are legible. Top-N and p <= 0.05 are display filters, not biological replication.

notes: Formal hash-bound original/final review evidence is included in the PBMC3K teaching case.
